resources.description: Tutorials and references on web development languages including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, SQL, and Python

resources.description: Interactive learning platform offering free coding certifications in web development, data visualization, and machine learning

resources.title: Khan Academy
resources.description: Non-profit educational platform providing free courses in programming, computer science, and mathematics for all ages

resources.title: GeeksforGeeks
resources.description: Computer science portal for geeks featuring algorithms, data structures, programming languages, and coding interview preparation

resources.description: Social development environment for front-end designers and developers to build and showcase websites, experiments, and prototypes

resources.description: Mozilla's comprehensive documentation for web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Web APIs

resources.description: Community-driven Q&A platform for professional and enthusiast programmers to solve coding problems
